Game.Name: Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu '94 - Ganba League 3 (Japan) (Beta)
Game.plot: Overview:Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu '94 Ganba League 3 is the third and final Super Famicom baseball game from Sting Entertainment and Epic/Sony Records. Like its two predecessors, the game adopts a super-deformed cartoon style.Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu '94 Ganba League 3 follows Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu Ganba League (best known in the US as Extra Innings) and Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu Ganba League '93.
Game.Notes: Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu '94 Ganba League 3 is the third and final Super Famicom baseball game from Sting Entertainment and Epic/Sony Records. Like its two predecessors, the game adopts a super-deformed cartoon style. Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu '94 Ganba League 3 follows Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu Ganba League (best known in the US as Extra Innings) and Hakunetsu Pro Yakyuu Ganba League '93.
